impacted_findings.name: Firewall is off for public networks
Security signatures are out of date

finding_impacts.name: Firewall is off for public networks
Security signatures are out of date

calculation_steps: 10 scored check(s): only OK, WARN and CRIT affect the score.
Each scored check can lose up to 5 severity points.
score_details.summary: Medium score: 1 critical finding(s) have the highest weight. 5/10 scored checks passed. Formula: 100 - round(13/50 * 100) = 74.
factors: Main score impact: Protection (7), Accounts (2), Network (2).
INFO and SKIP findings are listed for context but are not scored.

scoring_note: Medium score: 1 critical finding(s) have the highest weight. 5/10 scored checks passed. Formula: 100 - round(13/50 * 100) = 74.

findings.name: Firewall is off for public networks
findings.title: Firewall is off for public networks
findings.detail: The sample result shows the public firewall profile disabled.
findings.what_we_found: The sample result shows the public firewall profile disabled.
findings.why_it_matters: On public networks, an inactive firewall can expose services that should stay blocked.
findings.how_to_fix: Turn the firewall on for public networks.
findings.explanation: On public networks, an inactive firewall can expose services that should stay blocked.
findings.recommended_action: Turn the firewall on for public networks.
findings.remediation: Turn the firewall on for public networks.
fix_steps: Turn the firewall on for public networks.

findings.name: Password policy is weak
findings.title: Password policy is weak
findings.detail: The sample result shows no maximum password age configured.
findings.what_we_found: The sample result shows no maximum password age configured.
findings.why_it_matters: A weak password policy makes stale or reused passwords more likely.
findings.how_to_fix: Review local password rules and use long unique passwords.
findings.explanation: A weak password policy makes stale or reused passwords more likely.
findings.recommended_action: Review local password rules and use long unique passwords.
findings.remediation: Review local password rules and use long unique passwords.
fix_steps: Review local password rules and use long unique passwords.

findings.name: Remote Desktop appears exposed
findings.title: Remote Desktop appears exposed
findings.detail: The sample result shows TCP port 3389 listening on all local interfaces.
findings.what_we_found: The sample result shows TCP port 3389 listening on all local interfaces.
findings.why_it_matters: Remote Desktop should not be reachable unless it is required and protected.
findings.how_to_fix: Turn off Remote Desktop if you do not use it, or restrict it to trusted networks.
findings.explanation: Remote Desktop should not be reachable unless it is required and protected.
findings.recommended_action: Turn off Remote Desktop if you do not use it, or restrict it to trusted networks.
findings.remediation: Turn off Remote Desktop if you do not use it, or restrict it to trusted networks.
fix_steps: Turn off Remote Desktop if you do not use it, or restrict it to trusted networks.

findings.name: Security signatures are out of date
findings.title: Security signatures are out of date
findings.detail: The sample result shows antivirus signatures last updated 11 days ago.
findings.what_we_found: The sample result shows antivirus signatures last updated 11 days ago.
findings.why_it_matters: Old signatures can miss recent malware and suspicious files.
findings.how_to_fix: Run a protection update in Windows Security.
findings.explanation: Old signatures can miss recent malware and suspicious files.
findings.recommended_action: Run a protection update in Windows Security.
findings.remediation: Run a protection update in Windows Security.
fix_steps: Run a protection update in Windows Security.

findings.name: System updates need attention
findings.title: System updates need attention
findings.detail: The sample result shows the last successful update was 32 days ago.
findings.what_we_found: The sample result shows the last successful update was 32 days ago.
findings.why_it_matters: Security updates close known vulnerabilities attackers often reuse.
findings.how_to_fix: Install pending security updates and restart if needed.
findings.explanation: Security updates close known vulnerabilities attackers often reuse.
findings.recommended_action: Install pending security updates and restart if needed.
findings.remediation: Install pending security updates and restart if needed.
fix_steps: Install pending security updates and restart if needed.

findings.name: Some checks may need administrator access
findings.title: Some checks may need administrator access
findings.detail: The sample result includes checks that would need elevated permissions in a real scan.
findings.what_we_found: The sample result includes checks that would need elevated permissions in a real scan.
findings.why_it_matters: Limited permissions can hide some local account or policy details.
findings.how_to_fix: Run the final packaged scanner as administrator only if you trust it and need full local detail.
findings.explanation: Limited permissions can hide some local account or policy details.
findings.recommended_action: Run the final packaged scanner as administrator only if you trust it and need full local detail.
findings.remediation: Run the final packaged scanner as administrator only if you trust it and need full local detail.
